answers: JavaScript is THE language of the web. It runs in browsers, powers frontend (React, Vue) and backend (Node.js). Every web developer needs it.
JS basics: variables (let, const), functions, arrays, objects, DOM manipulation, async/await, and fetch API. Master these and you're solid!
Learn JavaScript: freeCodeCamp (free), JavaScript.info (best docs), Traversy Media (YouTube), or The Odin Project for full-stack learning.
JavaScript can build anything: websites, mobile apps (React Native), desktop apps (Electron), servers (Node.js), and even games. Super versatile!
